title: Senior Investment Banker at Yes Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Yes Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
